title: mutisia acuminata var. candolleana
intro: Mutisia acuminata var. candolleana, also known as Candolle's Mutisia, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Its medicinal properties include the ability to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Mutisia acuminata var. candolleana are typically used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures to alleviate symptoms of these conditions.
